title: ceanothus × lorenzenii
intro: Ceanothus × lorenzenii, also known as the Blueblossom or California Lilac, is a hybrid shrub that is a cross between Ceanothus cuneatus and Ceanothus gloriosus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ceanothus × lorenzenii include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and supporting the immune system, among others. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be applied topically in the form of salves and creams.
